---
author: ""
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{rotating}
   - \usepackage{float}
   - \usepackage{natbib}
   - \usepackage{booktabs}
   - \usepackage{multirow}
geometry: "left=1cm,right=1cm,top=0.9cm,bottom=1.2cm"
output: 
  pdf_document:
    citation_package: natbib
    keep_tex: true
    number_sections: true
#bibliography: ref.bib
link-citations: yes
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r, echo = FALSE, results = 'asis', warning=FALSE, message=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
options(xtable.comment = FALSE)
library(reshape)
library(data.table)
library(dplyr)
library(naniar)
library(scales)
library(tidyr)
library(xtable)
library(pracma)
library(this.path)
library(fs)

# set working directory to be the root of the code
setwd(this.path::this.dir())
for (stock_base in c("all", "large")){
  # estimated results
  data <- readRDS(paste0("../../tmp/portfolio_results/", stock_base,
  "/statistics/newey_west/remove_20pct_stk_FALSE.RDS")) %>%
    filter(grepl("combined", var)) %>%
    filter(hor_idx %in% 1:5) %>%
    mutate(hor_lab = paste0(from_hor, " $\\rightarrow$ ", to_hor), coef = 100 * coef, se = 100 * se) %>%
    select(var, var_type, hor_idx, hor_lab, coef, se)
  
  # also need to have symmetric and asymmetric ratios
  ratio_data <- readRDS(paste0("../../tmp/portfolio_results/", stock_base,
  "/statistics/newey_west_fraction/summary/port_returns_remove_20pct_stk_FALSE.RDS")) %>%
    filter(grepl("combined", var)) %>%
    rename(hor_idx = hor) %>%
    mutate(hor_idx = ifelse(hor_idx == 1, 1, 2)) %>%
    mutate(hor_lab = ifelse(hor_idx == 1, "1 $\\rightarrow$ 1", "1 $\\rightarrow$ 12")) %>%
    rename(coef = ratio, var_type = type)
  
  data <- rbind(data, ratio_data)
  rm(ratio_data)
  
  # separate samples
  data <- data[, .(var)] %>%
    unique() %>%
    arrange(var) %>%
    mutate(period_idx = row_number()) %>%
    inner_join(data, by = "var") %>%
    select(-var)
  
  # order the variables
  tmp <- unique(data[, .(period_idx, var_type)])
  tmp <- unique(tmp[, .(var_type)]) %>%
    arrange() %>%
    mutate(xx = c(3, 2, 1, 5, 4),
         xx = case_when(var_type == "sym"~2,
                        var_type == "asy"~3,
                        var_type == "total"~1,
                        var_type == "asy_to_total"~5,
                        var_type == "sym_to_total"~4)) %>%
    inner_join(tmp, by = "var_type") %>%
    arrange(period_idx, xx) %>%
    select(-xx) %>%
    mutate(row_idx = row_number())
  data <- merge(data, tmp, by = c("var_type", "period_idx"))
  rm(tmp)
  
  # add stars
  cuts <- abs(qnorm(c(.01, .05, .1) / 2))
  data[, abs_tstat := abs(coef / se)]
  data[, ss := ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[1], 3, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[2], 2, ifelse(abs_tstat > cuts[3], 1, 0)))]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0("$", sprintf("%.2f", coef))]
  data[, ss_lab := sapply(data[, ss], function(x) {
    ifelse(x > 0,
      paste0("^{", strcat(rep("*", x)), "}$"),
      "$"
    )
  })]
  data[, coef_lab := paste0(coef_lab, ss_lab)]
  data[, ss_lab := NULL]
  
  est <- cast(data[, list(row_idx, hor_idx, coef_lab)], row_idx ~ hor_idx)
  est[is.na(est)] <- ""
  
  se <- cast(data[, list(row_idx, hor_idx, se)], row_idx ~ hor_idx) %>%
    dplyr::mutate_at(vars(2:6), ~ paste0("$(", sprintf("%.2f", round(., 2)), ")$")) %>%
    select(-row_idx)
  se[se == "$(NA)$"] <- ""
  
  tbl <- data.table(bind_cols(est, se))
  rm(est, se)
  
  # add col columns
  col_names <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("", paste0("(", 1:10, ")")))))
  names(col_names) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- rbind(col_names, tbl)
  rm(col_names)
  
  # get labels right
  tbl[, row_idx := c("", rep(c("Total (\\%)", "Symmetric (\\%)", "Asymmetric (\\%)", "Symmetric/Total", "Asymmetric/total"), 3))]
  pp <- unique(data[, .(hor_idx, hor_lab)])[order(hor_idx)][, hor_lab]
  tt <- data.table(t(as.data.frame(c("Horizon:", pp, pp))))
  names(tt) <- names(tbl)
  tbl <- rbind(tt, tbl)
  rm(tt, pp)
  
  # add another one
  tt <- data.table(c("", "", "", "", "Full sample", "", "", "", "", "1926-1962", "", "", "", "", "1963-2023", "", ""))
  tbl <- cbind(tt, tbl)
  rm(tt)
  
  align_vector <- paste0("ll", paste0(rep("c", times = ncol(tbl) - 1), collapse = ""))
  x.side <- xtable(tbl, align = align_vector)
  
  this_add_to_row <- list(
    pos = list(0, 1, 1, 4, 6, 7, 9, 11, 12, 14, nrow(tbl)),
    command = c(
      "\\toprule & & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Cumulative returns (\\%)} & \\multicolumn{5}{c}{Standard error (\\%)} \\\\\n \\cmidrule(l){2-7} \\cmidrule(l){8-12}",
      "\\cmidrule(l){3-7} \\cmidrule(l){8-12}",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\hline",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\hline",
      "\\vspace{5pt}",
      "\\bottomrule \n"
    )
  )
  cat("The stock base is:", stock_base)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row
  )
  out_dir <- paste0(stock_base, "/")
  dir_create(out_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
  print(x.side,
    type = "latex",
    table.placement = "!ht",
    include.rownames = FALSE,
    include.colnames = FALSE,
    tabular.environment = "tabular",
    caption.placement = NULL, # "top", NULL
    hline.after = NULL, # We don't need hline; we use booktabs
    floating = FALSE, # whether \begin{Table} should be created (TRUE) or not (FALSE)
    sanitize.text.function = force, # Important to treat content of first column as latex function
    add.to.row = this_add_to_row,
    file = paste0(out_dir, "/reversal_decomp_nw.tex")
  )
}
```
